name: OpenClaw Integration
description: Bridges Agemon task/session events to OpenClaw channels and exposes an agemon skill for OpenClaw agents

settings.label: OpenClaw Webhook URL
settings.description: URL to send Agemon event notifications to (e.g. http://localhost:4040/api/webhooks/agemon)

settings.label: Webhook Auth Token
settings.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the OpenClaw webhook endpoint
